title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:

 431 |         return self.context.memory_manager.save_observation(
 432 |             observation,

 435 |             title=f"用户任务: {self._shorten(user_input, 80)}",

 439 | 
 440 |     def _observe_tool_result(self, tool_name: str, tool_input: Dict[str, Any], result: Any):
 441 |         """记录工具执行结果 Observation，失败/pytest 结果会沉淀为长期 MemoryItem。"""
 442 |         result_text = str(result)
 443 |         failed = self._is_failure_result(result_text)
 444 |         event_type = ObservationType.TOOL_FAILURE.value if failed else ObservationType.POST_TOOL_USE.value
 445 |         if tool_name == "run_pytest":
 446 |             event_type = ObservationType.TOOL_FAILURE.value if failed else ObservationType.TEST_RESULT.value
 447 | 
 448 |         files = self._extract_files_from_tool_call(tool_name, tool_input, result_text)
 449 |         observation = RawObservation(
 450 |             session_id=self.session_id,
 451 |             project=Path.cwd().name,
 452 |             cwd=str(Path.cwd()),
 453 |             event_type=event_type,
 454 |             tool_name=tool_name,
 455 |             tool_input=tool_input or {},
 456 |             tool_output=self._shorten(result_text, 4000) if not failed else None,
 457 |             error=self._shorten(result_text, 4000) if failed else None,
 458 |             files=files,
 459 |             metadata={"source": "AgentEngine.tool_dispatch", "success": not failed},
 460 |         )
 461 | 
 462 |         kind = MemoryKind.BUG.value if failed else MemoryKind.WORKFLOW.value
 463 |         title_status = "失败" if failed else "成功"
 464 |         return self.context.memory_manager.save_observation(
 465 |             observation,
 466 |             promote=True,
 467 |             kind=kind,
 468 |             title=f"工具执行{title_status}: {tool_name}",
 469 |             importance=0.8 if failed else 0.6,
 470 |             confidence=0.85,
 471 |         )
 472 | 
 473 |     def _remember_task_completion(self, user_input: str, final_answer: str):
 474 |         """任务结束时保存一条任务完成记忆，方便跨会话召回。"""
 475 |         content = f"用户任务: {user_input}\n完成结果: {final_answer}"
 476 |         observation = RawObservation(
 477 |             session_id=self.session_id,
 478 |             project=Path.cwd().name,
 479 |             cwd=str(Path.cwd()),
 480 |             event_type=ObservationType.SESSION_END.value,
 481 |             user_prompt=user_input,
 482 |             assistant_message=final_answer,
 483 |             files=self._extract_file_paths(content),
 484 |             metadata={"source": "AgentEngine.final_answer"},
 485 |         )
 486 |         item = self.context.memory_manager.save_observation(
 487 |             observation,
 488 |             promote=True,
 489 |             kind=MemoryKind.TASK.value,
 490 |             title=f"任务完成: {self._shorten(user_input, 80)}",
 491 |             importance=0.75,
 492 |             confidence=0.8,
 493 |         )
 494 |         if item:
 495 |             item.concepts = list(dict.fromkeys(item.concepts + self._extract_concepts(content)))
 496 |             self.context.memory_manager.save_memory_item(item)
 497 |         return item
 498 | 
 499 |     @staticmethod
 500 |     def _shorten(text: Any, limit: int) -> str:
 501 |         text = str(text or "")
 502 |         return text if len(text) <= limit else text[:limit] + "..."
 503 | 
 504 |     @staticmethod
 505 |     def _is_failure_result(result_text: str) -> bool:
 506 |         markers = ["❌", "Traceback", "Error", "Exception", "失败", "Exit Code 1", "Exit Code 2", "Exit Code 4"]
 507 |         return any(marker in result_text for marker in markers)
 508 | 
 509 |     def _extract_files_from_tool_call(self, tool_name: str, tool_input: Dict[str, Any], result_text...
